key_themes: Strong recurring revenue from sterilization services and installed base
Solid earnings beats with maintained FY26 guidance
Analyst Buy ratings with 25-30% implied upside
Recent share price weakness and valuation concerns
Orderly leadership transition and defensive healthcare positioning
summary: STERIS (STE) continues to demonstrate resilient fundamentals with recurring service revenue (roughly 75% of total), consistent mid-single-digit growth, and recent quarterly results that met expectations while maintaining FY26 guidance. The stock has pulled back notably from 2025 highs amid valuation debates, tariff mentions, and macro pressures, but this has drawn renewed investor attention as a potential entry into a high-quality defensive healthcare name. Analysts largely maintain Buy ratings with substantial upside, though some X and forum commentary notes it is not the cheapest compounder available and flags minor EO litigation tail risks.
sources: 12+ news/articles from Yahoo Finance, Zacks, TipRanks, GlobeNewswire (2025-2026 earnings, analyst notes), 15+ recent X posts (Latest mode, primarily 2026), Analyst consensus (median PT ~$291, Buy rating), Reddit investor threads and company IR releases
